title: Short Swords
description: This pack makes swords shorter than normal [all types of swords]
body: This texture pack redesigns Minecraft’s swords into shorter, more compact blades while keeping their original feel. The reduced length makes combat look cleaner and smoother, especially in first-person view and PvP. These shorter swords feel faster, more practical, and less bulky, giving the game a modern and polished style without changing gameplay mechanics
